samples.comment: The item didn't arrive on the expected delivery date multiple times, which made me anxious. I recommend changing the delivery company. Also, I felt uneasy about the support emails being handled by AI. While AI might be acceptable for digital products like plugins, I think it would be better to have a human handle inquiries about physical products from the start to avoid any anxiety. (In fact, the AI ​​gave answers that were slightly off-topic.)
I did not appreciate being gaslit by AI about my order

The reason is not true, but I didn't find "other" as an option. 

Support was fine. It's just that AI driven support is not for my taste. I understand it's in fact a small AI driven company in talking to, but I don't really fancy a future were support comes from answering machines or AI agents. Just an opinion. 

But the product is just great and I'm so happy with it.
AI provided solution did not fix the problem.
Réponse rapide mais complexité de la procédure pour un problème mineur et probablement courant
Really disappointed that I was dealt with by AI it lacked in empathy

While the result is great it’s very frustrating to only communicate by email. When I have time to deal with an issue I have time then. Not to send an email. Wait up to 48 hours for a reply and so it hues back and forth. I don’t always have the time to respond the.  Being able to talk to an actual human being would be so much nicer.
The answer I received is from AI and states that it may be incorrect. Useless.

Product not as advertised.
Order incomplete 
I will no longer be ordering products from positive grid and will look elsewhere for my gear.
Please remove me from your email list.
I was asked to do the same thing several times even after I stated those attempts were unsuccessful And had to wait a day for each response.

I simply didn’t get what was advertised in the email promotion.
Good product but disappointed in follow up support.
I will not be looking to replace my P.A. System from Positive Grid.

a human could have made these processes so much quicker. i wanted to get credit for the two failed devices and put that towards the purchase of the Steve Vai mini.  but ai would not let that go down.  so at this point my experience with positive grid   Sucks and i have been with you from the start.  so, of the 4 amps i have two have failed that are Battey powered
I received the RMA, but I can't find the attachment for the mailing label.
Fuck AI
Getting devices to pair is too hard.  The documentation to get it resolved is to hard ... to find the needle in the haystack solution.  Get to plug and play and both problems go away.
It felt greedy to not make OMNYSS available to purchase for a long time customer.
It is just unfair to reason with an AI which claimed a wrong fact to begin with.
I don’t no AI BS. I wanted real support.
I just need a spare part replacement, come on why always contacted by ai, this is outrageous, i just need a spark go mainboard
The agent said that they were going to replace my spark 40 amp. I haven’t heard anything else about that. I was supposed to get a label to return something and I didn’t get that totally ignored

allComments.comment: the support is ok,the connectivity is worst with Android and Google, i'm done with this kit spend too much time, and it's for sale, thank you

I received the RMA, but I can't find the attachment for the mailing label.

Using i, o and s in a serial number that also uses numerical characters has been a well known problem since I was programming in the '70s.  I was very frustrated, but figured it out.  Support responded by pointing out that those characters are confused with numerals.  Since you know this, why not PUT THIS INFORMATION on the web page?   Ever better, don't use those characters.

I was initially pretty happy with your products, but this is downright stupid.  The footswitch requiring a phone to function with the Spark Mini is a huge disappointment for me.
Fuck AI
Getting devices to pair is too hard.  The documentation to get it resolved is to hard ... to find the needle in the haystack solution.  Get to plug and play and both problems go away.
It felt greedy to not make OMNYSS available to purchase for a long time customer.
Dropbox sucks.
I guess due to a lack of your support, I will go thru Sweetwater support…F-
It is just unfair to reason with an AI which claimed a wrong fact to begin with.
I don’t no AI BS. I wanted real support.

Literally made a mistake in order. Immediately tried to correct it. Now I’m getting 4 headphones delivered (I wanted two). I’ll have to ship back. Any other online company I’ve worked with (Amazon, Sweetwaters, etc) have ability to correct or cancel an order.
I just need a spare part replacement, come on why always contacted by ai, this is outrageous, i just need a spark go mainboard
The agent said that they were going to replace my spark 40 amp. I haven’t heard anything else about that. I was supposed to get a label to return something and I didn’t get that totally ignored

AI is not support
. Amp still isn't working, will probably return it for a Boss.
Because it was handled 100 percent by AI, how do I know that my message was properly passed onto the delivery?
I need someone to contact me again about my issue

Fist a rude AI response, then a follow up by an abrasive human? who just repeated the AI generated response I got previously. Its clear Positive Grid does not care about their customers, and that Positive Grid only cares about their profit margin. Offering a free carry bag to customers that buy off the Positive Grid website and not to customers who buy off Amazon, in my case not finding out about the offer or the Positive Grid  site until after I bought my Spark 2 from Amazon and then registering the amp, then Positive Grid refusing to offer the same free bag to me. I did get a coupon to save $20 if I buy the bag from Positive Grid site, IF the coupon offer is even eligible for the purchase which I must look up on the site. What a lowlife, shitty way to treat customers. What else could I expect from China? Positive Grid would rather see me return the amp to Amazon and reb-buy it from the positive Grid site to get the free bag, ultimately sticking Positive Grid with a used amp. I am writing a nasty review on Amazon warning people not to buy off Amazon if they want to get the free carry bag which is what actually makes it a "PORTABLE AMP" like in your ads. I van only hope that hundreds of people see this and return their Amazon and Guitar Center amps to get the free bag while penalizing Positive Grid with maybe thousands of used returned amps they will have to deal with along with the black eye in the music community of negative reviews on your no support policy.
I talked to an ai. I thought maybe a human would be more sympathetic. Lol.
Sorry but the "solution" to the "standard" mudiness of the sound by a chatbot reply is not enough.
Your bot wasted my time, I got tens of useless messages before finally talking to someone that could solve my issue.
My problem with connecting sparkGo to MacBook Air was not solved

I suppose the customer support agents are doing the best they can but it's takin way too LONG for me to receive my order AND - I still have not received it.    

Devin (AI) (Positive Grid)

 Dear Valued Customer,

Good news! Your resend order [RS-PG-217575] has been shipped via the following carrier(s) and tracking number(s):

AMAZON-LOGISTICS-US (TBA327130659758)
*If there is currently no tracking available, please allow some time for our partner carrier to register your package into their network and check back later.

Thanks again for reaching out! We will be closing this ticket soon. If you do not require further assistance, there is no need to reply to this message. But if you are still experiencing any issues, please reply to this mail with further details or feel free to visit our Help Center
My order has arrived so you can disregard  the last pat of my previous feedback but the rest of it still stands. Thank You
My son's Christmas present is arriving 4 days after Christmas even though I alerted support mid-December about this issue for an order placed at the beginning of the month.  Frustrated Momma Claus

Transparency of the roadmap for future releases is critical when making rig design decisions that will carry into the future.  I have enjoyed your software products for what they are but will be forced to go a different direction for what they are not.  If I see the features requested on a roadmap somewhere I am likely to wait it out and deal with things as they are until then.

After unforeseen events for an amp I ordered on -12/2, I was told that if I wanted it before Christmas I should order it on Amazon or a local retailer. That is really bad service to hear from the direct supplier. The supplier that provides these products to Amazon and local dealers. This is the 4th spark amp I’ve purchased but I’m thinking about

After unforeseen events for an amp I ordered on -12/2, I was told that if I wanted it before Christmas I should order it on Amazon or a local retailer. That is really bad service to hear from the direct supplier. The supplier that provides these products to Amazon and local dealers. This is the 4th spark amp I’ve purchased but I’m thinking about switching to a different company that stands behind thier products and rectifies issues that are problems in thier own system.

I purchased a Spark 40 three or four years ago. I cannot connect my amp with my iPad.
It’s saying my iPad is out of date. Is there any fix to this ? Thank you for your attention to this matter.

I’m delighted that I received a timely response to a simple (but confusing) issue - with info within that resolved my problem.
I’m quite displeased at having my simple inquiry handled 100% by an AI/robot - though it managed to include the actual solution to my inquiry, being treated in this manner makes it clear the PG does not value their customers as humans, let alone artists. FAIL.

Very fast an kind help, but the solution to my problem is yet to come with a future (?) firmware update. The discount code I received is a nice touch but I won’t use it, as all of your products are too expensive (for a reason, not questioning your quality, of course)

Frankly, I am very disappointed at the customer service shown by Positive Grid here to a valued long-time customer. I have bought the Spark 40, the Spark Edge, the Spark Neo, and the Spark Mini. But PG cannot do a simple points reversal/allocation/take an action that helps me get the same value as the points I lost. Lost, because of a lack of information on the PG website/points platform.

Noted for the future,
Ahmed
I'm a full time musician and bought the Live amp in June and I have loved it. It has an issue now and I still have no solution. It's been 2 weeks and still no resolve. Please help!

The support response did not mention the fact that the documents folder might, possibly, be located in another (user-defined) location which was the case on my computer. However, the response did lead me to suspect that this might be the case and so I was eventually able to locate the Bias-x user-defined data.
So the response "nearly" solved my problem.
This should be provided.

Your Spark 2 app is buggy - You need to ship these with dials set to 5 across the board.  The Serial Number size (and the scanner thing beside it) 1) Scanner thing doesn't work - the Serial number is way to small on the Spark 50 - On the Spark mini - literally are you effing kidding me?

The App doesn't automagically pickup and register the product through the popup link - your destructions on these are non-existent.  The Packs you all have area a bad stinking joke.
